memory.summary: Teammate A asked me to take over their part today due to personal issues, which conflicts with my plan to finish only my share this afternoon.
I made progress on my share, but teammate A is still asking for help despite my earlier refusal to take over their part.
I accepted the teammate's dumped work, increasing my load from 0.00 to 0.14 despite already having a heavier task list.
I made slow progress on my share, but the deadline is now under an hour away and the work remains unfinished.
Both my share and the dumped teammate's work missed their 19:00 deadline, leaving me with unfinished tasks despite my limited energy.
I made slight progress on my share, but with a two-hour sleep debt and high stress, the deadline is still imminent.
Taking on the teammate's unfinished work at 23:00 has increased my load while I am already exhausted with high stress and zero energy.
By 23:30, I failed to act on the teammate's unfinished work, leaving both our shares incomplete despite my exhaustion and zero energy.
I made slight progress on my share, but with zero energy and two hours of sleep debt, the deadline remains critically close.
After working one hour, I only increased my project progress by 0.03 despite being exhausted with zero energy and high stress.
By 03:00, my inaction left the project unchanged despite high stress and zero energy. The deadline remains critically close with no progress made.
Working two hours increased my project progress from 0.74 to 0.80, yet I remain at zero energy with high stress and sleep debt.
